title: Yard Sale Sign
text:
## Yard Sale Sign

Huge {adjective} yard sale this {day of week} at {place}.

We have {number} {plural noun}, a gently used {object}, one {color} {vehicle}, and a mysterious box labeled do not {verb}.

Ask {person} about the vintage {clothing item} or the {animal} that keeps {verb ending in -ing} by the lemonade table.

Prices are {adjective}; haggling makes us {emotion}.

Free {food} with every purchase of a {noun} from a {job}.
